variation_files.prompt: A computer software interface window displaying a two-page document layout in a book-viewing mode. The left page is a solid gray background, while the right page is plain white with centered black text reading "The Munros in the 20th Century" at the top, followed by "by Christopher Ian Munro" in the middle, and "Lisbon 2012" at the bottom. The window has a light blue title bar at the top with a standard Windows-style menu bar below it, including options like File, Edit, View, Add, Publish, Tools, Book, Internet, Window, and Help. On the left side, there is a vertical toolbar with icons and a small panel labeled "The Munros..."

A computer screen displaying a genealogy software interface with a two-page document layout showing a family tree report. The left and right pages contain structured text entries for ancestors, each accompanied by small portrait photographs aligned to the right of the text. The document is titled "3. Ancestors of Ian MUNRO" at the top of the left page. A vertical toolbar on the far left includes icons for navigation and document tools. The top of the screen features a menu bar with options like File, Edit, View, Add, Publish, Tools, Book, Internet, Window, and Help. On the right side, a vertical panel shows page navigation controls including "Pages 8-9 Total: 16", "Page Width", "Zoom

A computer screen interface displaying a multi-generational family tree diagram with rectangular nodes arranged in a hierarchical layout. Each node contains a small portrait photo and text details, connected by lines indicating familial relationships. The background is a solid light gray with horizontal bands separating generations. A standard window title bar is visible at the top, and a vertical scrollbar is present on the right side. The interface includes a toolbar with icons along the top edge and a vertical panel on the left side with icons and labels. The overall layout is clean and structured, resembling a genealogy software application in use.

A split-screen layout of a logic puzzle game interface on a textured light brown background. Below the top panel, a large grid of circular cells is arranged in ten rows and five columns, each cell containing a colorful geometric shape — including hearts, plus signs, waves, stars, diamonds, squares, triangles, and circles — in various colors. A dark background with a central glowing blue-bordered 4x4 grid of dark blue tiles, some containing brightly colored numbers in various hues. Above the grid, a white rectangular bar and five circular icons with glowing blue outlines are arranged horizontally. To the left of the grid, a vertical column of plain white text. To the right of the grid, another vertical column of plain white text. The overall layout is symmetrical, with the grid as the focal point, and the lighting creates a neon, digital game interface aesthetic.
